title: Blackbeard Strikes Amazon Lily
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Wano Citizens, Kaido, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Yamato as Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.
scene: Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Near Sphinx (whitebeard's Homeland),

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Flap flag

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right, thanks again for the ride-yo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're really not going to join the crew, Marco?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAHAHA! quit dreaming.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm way too old and worn out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to keep playing babysitter for you GREAT Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hehe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, it's not like I'm a handful or anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Back me up here, Beck!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 'Fraid I CAN'T.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: See ya around!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: A little earlier, back in Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Seriously?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not leaving with us?! Come on, be a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Say it ain't so, Yamato- chan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You probably already know this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that forest guy was only driven off thanks to whoever caused that immense burst of Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kaido might be gone now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his absence has opened up the floodgates for guys like 7:47 to pour into the country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can't just abandon everybody now, can I?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, I doubt either of us would enjoy our adventures...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: ...If we were always worrying about Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But man, I still really want to be one of you! to be a real crewmate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you got a point... it would be a load off my mind....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, I'll leave momo and others to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Careful, Yamato. Momo has a lot of pride. Don't wound it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know! I'll find another reason for me to stay!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Yamato- chan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a ship nearby that'll give me a lift,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So I'll be heading off first-you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Marco!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're leaving already?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You saved me back in the summit war, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I never got to say thanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Jinbe!! Take ace's brother and go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: back then, we all seemed so ready to spring into action.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: makes you wonder why, doesn't it, jinbe?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAHAHA! that was a while ago, who could say?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure ace would be proud to see how far you've come-you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shishish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh yeah?!

summary: This part advances the Amazon Lily / World Aftermath through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
